description: N5(q) central capability gate always returns true. Unlocks 30+ server-gated features (allow_remote_sessions, allow_product_feedback, allow_remote_control, allow_quick_web_setup, etc.) regardless of enterprise/team policy_limits dict. Operator is sole admin — no org policy applies.

patches.description: N5 short-circuit allow-all; original logic kept as unreachable tail
